name: Shivam Kumar
summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years building enterprise-scale service management platforms and full-stack applications in Java, Spring Boot, and React, with production experience in authentication, RBAC, payment integrations, and real-time systems.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed and maintained enterprise-scale service management platforms using Java, Struts, PostgreSQL, and REST APIs for deployments across India, UAE, Vietnam, and KSA.
Built secure backend APIs for mobile applications using JWT authentication, session management, and role-based authorization.

Redesigned KPI dashboard aggregation architecture by replacing inefficient CUBE-based querying with optimized GROUPING SETS, improved indexing strategies, and paginated data loading for faster analytics performance.
Implemented realtime chat systems and live engineer-tracking functionality using WebSockets and polling-based synchronization.
Integrated Google Maps APIs, BillDesk payment gateway, SMS vendor APIs, and legacy SOAP/REST services into existing monolithic and hybrid application ecosystems.
Resolved OWASP-reported vulnerabilities including XSS, insecure headers, and authentication loopholes across customer-facing deployments.

projects.name: SkillSphere
projects.stack: React, TypeScript, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, WebSockets
bullets: Engineered a gamified full-stack learning platform featuring skill-tree progression systems, collaborative study rooms, project workflows, and realtime communication capabilities.
Designed scalable backend architecture using Spring Boot, JWT authentication, RBAC, DTO mapping, PostgreSQL persistence, and layered service patterns.
Implemented realtime collaborative study rooms using WebSockets/STOMP with live chat, room presence tracking, and moderation capabilities.

projects.name: URL Shortener Service
bullets: Developed a scalable URL shortening service with short-code generation, redirect handling, and analytics tracking capabilities.
Built RESTful APIs and optimized database queries for fast redirection and retrieval performance.

projects.name: AI Shorts Automation Pipeline
bullets: Built an automated AI-content pipeline that aggregates trending news, ranks content using custom scoring logic, and generates short-form scripts using local LLM inference.
Integrated GPU-accelerated TTS, subtitle generation, stock-footage retrieval, and FFmpeg-based video assembly to produce upload-ready vertical short-form videos.
